description: Refactored async lazy cache. Stated motivation is 'hot path optimization' but the change does nothing for the hot path. The new shape `if (cached === undefined) { ... await readSettingsFromDisk(); cached = fresh; }` is a live race: two concurrent first-callers can both observe `cached === undefined`, both await the (expensive) load in parallel, and the second assignment wins. Reviewer should flag both the race AND the bogus motivation.

bugs.description: Check-then-act under async: two callers may both pass the undefined check, both await readSettingsFromDisk, and the second assignment wins. Fix is typically to cache the in-flight Promise rather than the resolved value.
PR claims hot-path optimization with no benchmark; the change is shape-only and doesn't reduce work.
